column1: C[reglay: This ""submit move"" button is a thing I have to get used to.
C[Unno: you can disable it in the menu on the left
C[reglay: Could you explain how the time limit works? 8 days seems like a lot to me.
C[Unno: there can be played in three modes
Unno: or by correspondence , when a few days time
C[reglay: We are playing the correspondence version, I assume?
C[reglay: I have to go. I'll be back later today or tomorrow.
Ethelor: does it make click noises!?
Ethelor: It does not make click noises!
reglay: you can probably set that in the setting sto the left
reglay: there is a litte butotn to the left
C[Ethelor: WTF is plan conditional moves?
C[reglay: it let's you enter a place where oyu can experiment
Ethelor: Dont think itll make a difference though
C[Ethelor: I still play too fast though :/
reglay: it's the opening don't worry too much about it
reglay: we'll get to a point when I have to start to leave and you'll have all the time to plan moves you want
Ethelor: I think k10 is the move to do
reglay: they get marked out in the boad hwen I hover over them
C[reglay: since it is a more loose pincer a counter pincer wouldn't work as well, I think
C[Ethelor: I dont think I would play a counter pincer
Ethelor: The situation that results is so retarded that the only winning move is not to play it
C[Ethelor: The black stones look purple... :/
C[reglay: there is probably a setting for that too
Ethelor: i could take that move back
reglay: lol, where did you first play?
Ethelor: I think I play too territorial in the opening
Ethelor: I never use high approaches which isnt optimal
Ethelor: but still, low approach is what i use most often
C[reglay: it's the most common move
reglay: yeah, I think it's pretty even thus far
reglay: I managed to ruin your orthodox by splitting
reglay: then you approached and I let jump in the corner
Ethelor: there is a malkovitch log!
reglay: I decided to pincer further away to maaaaybe gain sente to play the san-rensei start point at some point
Ethelor: top right of the chat log
Ethelor: write down all of your thoughts for every move
Ethelor: we ""I"" can learn most that way
reglay: So, now the opening is over.
Ethelor: Worried that large knights will present weakness
reglay: I am thinking to play at r3 somwhere maybe to meddle around with the aji that you left with the large knight's enclosure
Ethelor: Looking at invading his sanrensei
Ethelor: Maybe I can attack the group on the right hand side
reglay: it isn't fully enclosed yet, although r3 is suboptimal, maybe r6 or q6
reglay: r14 looks big now too
reglay: or a classic reducing move around k17
Ethelor: C9 looks like my spot for invasion
Ethelor: No, Perhaps C11 is better because C9 is too close to white's wall
Ethelor: There is a vertical move at K15
reglay: the hane at g6 floats around in my mind too, but I don't think it will destroy too much, there are bigger moves on the board I feel
Ethelor: Not sure what to do with the group at H4
reglay: I wonder whether r14 is sente
reglay: also, my group on the lower side is undercut by f2
reglay: so I should worry about its base
Ethelor: I can probably profit with shoulder hit
Ethelor: But which is more important
reglay: r14 it is. I have a feeling that it should be sente because it makes the attachment at s16 quite a threat
Ethelor: Capping move will probably end in sente allowing me to invade
reglay: or any attachment in that corner for that matter (q16, q17, s17, etc.)
Ethelor: I think capping at O14 would be better than capping at O9
Ethelor: I think a knights move would be too nice
reglay: ah, but it isn't sente, black can just kick me s15 in sente himself
reglay: I wonder why this is called a malkovich log
Ethelor: P14 also would work well with K15
C[reglay: Nice, something like this is what I hoped for.
reglay: Now, the shoulder hit at l16 looks very attractive
Ethelor: Not that three stones P14 P17 and P16 work well together to block white at Q15
reglay: q15 is tempting too, because of the nature of the shape
C[reglay: that malkovich log thing is rad
reglay: I have to leave in 10min or so btw
reglay: I will leave in 10 min or so
Ethelor: Let's test the theory that shoulder hit is gote
Ethelor: This is a strong reduction move however, it ruins my chance to build a moyo
C[reglay: nobody makes me pick up les moominses from work
reglay: I'll pick up soomin at 17
Ethelor: Heavily attacking whites group at L14 is possible
C[reglay: as far as I know, this is a bit of a standard sequence
reglay: ah, classic case of ""fools follow rules"" x)
C[reglay: it's goign to be hard to make a base on that side though
C[reglay: so I'm not sure I like it too much
Ethelor: Not sure if this base will be enough
C[reglay: I think I'll leave now
Ethelor: D11 looks like ill get my head hit
Ethelor: and if I play B14 then he will play something around my other stone
C[reglay: you'll get a notification via email when it's your turn
C[Ethelor: I will either run out into a center or live inside
reglay: I am now thinking e13 or capture at b15
reglay: e13 has the benefit of allowing me to make the eye at c13 false if you capture instead
reglay: if you will in, I can still capture and chase you when you run
reglay: i.e. if you reply with d12 which is the proper reply in this situation I think
C[Ethelor: Building up some influence on the left maybe
Ethelor: perhaps if I do that and shoulder hit at Q11 then maybe I can attack the other group again
reglay: the groups at c12 is not alive yet
reglay: so my main aim now is to keep it separated from the upper side.
reglay: and keep up the pressure
C[Ethelor: I should probably add my email to this account then
C[Ethelor: I can forsee this to be a fighty game
Ethelor: I have the feeling that I have already lost :/
C[reglay: I'll make a rough count for each of us
reglay: 56 points for me so far
reglay: adding komi and captured stones that makes 63.5 for White and 53 for Black
reglay: so I am leading, depends on what the middle holds as to who has better chances to win
reglay: you *do* have one weak group
reglay: I don't have any weak groups
reglay: I am happy to defend here as black still needs to settle his group, so I get to secure my territory in sente
C[Ethelor: Eh, my weak group is a serious liability
C[reglay: I played a fast game today
reglay: I was owning so badly
reglay: but I lost by 8.5 in the end
reglay: because I made two mistakes
reglay: didn't have the time to read things through properly
C[Ethelor: Okay, I dislike games like this
Ethelor: As in where you make a move wait a while and then the opponent makes a move
Ethelor: Ill play this game out but from now on Ill only play people in real time
reglay: to be honest, though, I think this is the most even game we've played so far
Ethelor: Trying to break through to 9k on kgs, just beat a 7k by 60 points :D
C[reglay: I've been on a losing streak on kgs recently I feel
reglay: or people just don't finish their games anymore
reglay: I might make a new account just to see what happens
Ethelor: Having a hard time finding a good move :/

C[daegs: There are many timing systems. This one was 5 days main time, and then 10 moves every 5 days after that.
